title: Shared Government Information System for Migration
content: The Omnibus Implementing Rules and Regulations (IRR) of Republic Act No. 8042, as amended by RA 10022, provides for the establishment and use of a Shared Government Information System for Migration. This system is designed to facilitate the exchange and sharing of migration-related data among government agencies to improve coordination, monitoring, and enforcement of migration policies and programs. The system aims to enhance transparency, efficiency, and accuracy in the management of migration information, ensuring that all relevant government entities have timely access to necessary data to support the protection and welfare of migrant workers.
